title: DLR: Prohibited Practices — Case-Law Summary (M.G.L. c.150E)
description: Chapter of the Massachusetts Public Employee Collective Bargaining Law Guide (DLR) covering the case-law treatment of prohibited practices under M.G.L. c.150E — refusal-to-bargain, unilateral change, interference with protected rights, and employer/union unfair labor practices as adjudicated by the DLR. A large reference compiling decades of DLR decisions.
notes: CONSUMPTION HAZARD: large file (~141 KB); head sampled for metadata. No standalone filing deadline on this reference chapter; charge-filing deadline (6 months from knowledge) is in the companion ULP procedures chapter.
